entries.statement: Design and document the enterprise data architecture, including platform topology, data domain structure, integration patterns, and technology choices that support data governance and analytical objectives.
Develop and enforce data standards, policies, and procedures across the data platform, including data management requirements, naming conventions, classification schemes, and lifecycle governance.

Design, build, and maintain automated data ingestion pipelines from source systems to the data platform, including schema mapping, transformation logic, error handling, and data quality validation at ingestion points.

Design and maintain the analytics transformation layer, including staging models, intermediate transformations, conformed dimensions, fact tables, and consumption-ready data mart models for BI and analytics.

Define, document, and implement enterprise metric definitions in the semantic layer, ensuring consistency across BI tools, business intelligence platforms, and analytical consumers through metric governance.

Implement platform monitoring and alerting systems for data availability, performance, cost optimization, and operational health, with defined escalation procedures and continuous performance measurement.
Manage data platform access controls, including role definitions, permission grants, access reviews, privilege escalation procedures, and enforcement of least-privilege principles across data assets.

Implement and maintain data backup and disaster recovery procedures, including automated backup scheduling, recovery testing, failover execution, and validation that recovery objectives are achievable.

Perform database administration and routine maintenance tasks, including schema optimization, patching, index management, storage allocation, performance tuning, and end-of-life planning for database systems.
Design and implement data API and service layers that enable controlled data consumption, including endpoint design, authentication integration, rate limiting, documentation, and usage monitoring.
Execute data platform capacity planning, including workload characterization, growth forecasting, resource utilization analysis, and scaling recommendations that balance performance and cost.
Conduct data platform security assessments, including vulnerability scanning, access control audits, encryption verification, and remediation of identified security gaps in data infrastructure.

Manage schema evolution and versioning across data platform environments, including compatibility assessment, migration execution, consumer notification, and validation that schema changes do not break downstream systems.

Design and implement event-driven data architectures, including message broker configuration, event schema design, consumer group management, and monitoring of event processing latency and throughput.
Conduct data platform vendor evaluations and proofs of concept, including requirements definition, test scenario design, evaluation criteria development, and evidence-based platform recommendations.
Plan and execute data migration projects between platforms, including source-to-target mapping, data validation, cutover scheduling, rollback planning, and post-migration verification.

Design and maintain data catalog and metadata management systems, including automated metadata harvesting, business glossary integration, data asset discovery, and lineage visualization across the platform.
Execute comprehensive data pipeline and platform testing, including test scenario design, automated testing, data quality validation, end-to-end integration testing, and continuous quality assurance.

Build and maintain automated data pipelines with version control, automated testing, CI/CD deployment, infrastructure-as-code, environment parity, rollback procedures, and production-ready release management.

Produce and maintain comprehensive data architecture documentation, including system topology diagrams, data flow documentation, technology stack descriptions, operational runbooks, and architecture decision records.
